title: brachyscome angustifolia var. heterophylla
intro: Brachyscome angustifolia var. heterophylla, also known as the Swan River daisy or Variable Brachyscome, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to Western Australia. It is used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and even act as a natural antiseptic for wound healing. Brachyscome angustifolia var. heterophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
